CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Off Calendar

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Imposition Of Appropriate Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $11,775.58 Against Plaintiff And Her Attorneys Of Record For Violation Of California Code Of Civil Procedure ? 128.5
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOMINIC PORRINO, TEL. NO. 1-916-614-7900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD P. ZAPPIA OF THE ZAPPIA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-213-814-5550 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE ZAPPIA LAW FIRM AND EDWARD ZAPPIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Cal. Bus Prof. Code 6204(c) states: "[T]he trial after arbitration shall be initiated by the commencement of an action in the court having jurisdiction over the amount of money in controversy within 30 days after service of notice of the award." Defendant has properly filed suit in Los Angeles County. On August 4, 2015, the Los Angeles County Superior Court held: "Cal. Bus Prof. Code 6203 and 6204 and Judicial Council Form ADR Rules 104 and 105 expressly establish that jurisdiction of this post non-binding arbitration attorney fee dispute which occurred in Los Angeles County remains in Los Angeles County." Here, the causes of action alleged in the FAC arise from the fee dispute between the parties. The Los Angeles County Superior Court has ruled that it is has jurisdiction over this matter, therefore Plaintiff must bring this complaint in Los Angeles County. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Off Calendar
